name: Pendo
description: Connects to the Pendo Aggregation API to sync guides, features, pages, accounts, and visitors into the Shielva knowledge base. Authenticates via the x-pendo-integration-key header.

install_fields.label: Integration Key
install_fields.help: Your Pendo Integration Key. Found in Pendo → Settings → Integrations → Integration Keys.

methods.name: Install / Authenticate
methods.description: Validate integration_key via GET /api/v1/app. Returns HEALTHY/CONNECTED or OFFLINE with the failure reason.

methods.name: Health Check
methods.description: Call GET /api/v1/app and return HEALTHY with app count, or DEGRADED/OFFLINE on failure.

methods.name: Sync
methods.description: Full sync: fetches guides and features for all apps; normalizes each to a ConnectorDocument.

methods.name: List Apps
methods.description: List all Pendo applications in the subscription.

methods.name: List Guides
methods.description: List in-app guides for a given app ID.

methods.name: List Features
methods.description: List tagged features for a given app ID.

methods.name: List Pages
methods.description: List pages for a given app ID.

methods.name: List Accounts
methods.description: Fetch accounts via the Pendo Aggregation API pipeline.

methods.name: List Visitors
methods.description: Fetch visitors via the Pendo Aggregation API pipeline.
